---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for OpenSwarm
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Focus on the problem within OpenSwarm, not on a specific external tool.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. If multiple approaches exist, list them.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or approaches have you considered? Include at least one approach that does not depend on external services.

## Conflict of Interest Disclosure

Do you maintain or have affiliation with any project, product, or service mentioned in this proposal? If yes, state it clearly here.

- [ ] No conflict of interest.
- [ ] Yes — Disclosure: 

## Checklist

- [ ] This proposal defines the problem independent of any specific external tool.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
